title: About
intro: Theoretical physicist working at the intersection of quantum control, quantum computing, and machine learning.

services.title: Quantum Control & Feedback
services.description: Design and analysis of advanced feedback protocols for open quantum systems, including path-integral quantum control and stochastic optimal control.

services.title: Stochastic Quantum Dynamics
services.description: Lindblad master equations, quantum trajectories, and continuous measurement theory with geometric interpretations of measurement backaction.

services.title: Quantum Computing Theory
services.description: Algorithms and control strategies for quantum annealing and measurement-based quantum computing under realistic noise and hardware constraints.
